mapper.select: SELECT aggregate_type, aggregate_id, last_event_version, last_event_id, last_operation FROM search_index_aggregate_state WHERE aggregate_type = #{aggregateType} AND aggregate_id = #{aggregateId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO search_index_aggregate_state ( aggregate_type, aggregate_id, last_event_version, last_event_id, last_operation, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, 0, '', 'INIT', #{updatedAt} )
